---
title: "Code"
output: 
 html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: false
    number_sections: false
    toc_depth: 1
    #code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE,warning=FALSE, cache=TRUE)
```

# Steps to install Stata 17 in Linux

## Install

1. Lets create an installation folder in Downloads of your computer.

- Access to the Downloads through the terminal of your Linux OS.

```default
cd ~/Downloads
```

- Create a temporary folder titled "statainstall" inside the Downloads.

```default
mkdir statainstall
```

- Paste your Stata 17 installtion file "Stata17Linux64.tar.gz" in your newly created folder titled "statainstall".

- Access the "statainstall" folder by using terminal of Linux

```default
cd statainstall
```

-
